name: Something Different on a Budget Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------GLAZE-----------------------------------
2 tbsp Hot mustard
1 tsp Garlic - crushed
1/4 cup Apricot jam
Contributed to the echo by: Fred Towner Originally from: The Calgary Sun's
Great Meatloaf Recipe Search, Monday, June 4, 1990 Submitted by Christine
Barabe
Something Different on a Budget Meatloaf-6th prize:
Mix chicken, pork, beef, eggs, breadcrumbs, milk, honey and salt and pepper.
Shape into a loaf and put in pan. Mix glaze ingredients together and spread
over top of loaf. Sprinkle with additional breadcrumbs. Bake in 325F oven for
1-1/2 hours.
Servings: 6
